---
name: Confidence band draft thresholds
description: SUPERSEDED draft thresholds from 2026-03-20. Final calibrated values in project_confidence_scorer.md.
type: reference
---

Early draft confidence band thresholds from 2026-03-20 design session (pre-calibration):

- high: > 0.90
- med: 0.65 – 0.90
- low: < 0.65

**Status: SUPERSEDED.** These were initial guesses before calibration against the real doc corpus.

**Final calibrated values** (post 200-doc calibration run): high >0.88, med 0.62–0.88, low <0.62. See `project_confidence_scorer.md`.

Do not use the draft thresholds operationally.
